===Pokémon Generations===
[[File:Malva PG.png|thumb|250px|Malva in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Malva appeared in ''[[PG16|The Beauty Eternal]]'', where she was seen on a billboard reporting that [[Lysandre Labs]] had decided to increase production of the [[Holo Caster]] due to its success among [[Kalos]]ians and the resulting stock shortage.
